title: Setup
calibration_status_none: Not calibrated yet — calibrate to tune mic levels, instrument, and latency.
latency_offset_hint: Compensates for audio interface delay. Positive values shift the timing window earlier (your audio arrives late). Re-calibration overwrites this; this slider is for fine-tuning afterwards.
default_noise_suppress_hint: Applied to new game and tuner sessions. Each session can still toggle locally.
synth_quality_hint: Choose the sound quality for backing tracks. Larger soundfonts are downloaded once and cached.
synth_quality_medium_desc: 8 MB · Creative GM soundfont — realistic instruments
synth_quality_high_desc: 28 MB · Creative GM soundfont — highest quality
